scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && .venv\Scripts\activate && uvicorn main:app --reload" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:full: concurrently "cd backend && .venv\Scripts\activate && uvicorn main:app --reload" "cd frontend && npm run dev" "powershell -Command Start-Sleep -s 8; start http://localhost:8080"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install
